name: Formula One 1988
attribution: Historical data derived from f1db (github.com/f1db/f1db, CC BY 4.0)
AI ratings from the community F-Classic_Gen2_1988.xml custom-AI set, matching the F1_Season_1988 skinpack (jusk)
notes: Authored correction: Pierluigi Martini country 'SWE' -> 'ITA' — Martini is Italian (f1db nationality: italy); the source XML's SWE is a data-entry error.
Coverage: f1db 1988 entrant Alex Caffi (dallara+ford, rounds 1-16) has no livery in the referenced skinpack/AI set and is not included in this pack.
Coverage: f1db 1988 entrant Pierre-Henri Raphanel (lola+ford, rounds 16) has no livery in the referenced skinpack/AI set and is not included in this pack.
The source custom-AI XML carries a large per-track (tracks="...") override set; those patches are not carried into this pack's aiOverrides in this version.
